summary: Comprehensive testing of Equipment Types and Accessories features in Admin Overview. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verify Equipment Revenue chart, Equipment Breakdown table, Accessories Sold section, pay period filter, and all regression tests for existing features.

issues: Console warning: Recharts chart width/height -1 when component renders before container size is determined. This is a known minor Recharts issue that doesn't affect functionality.

passed_tests: Backend: /admin/comparison returns equipment_types in totals with correct structure
Backend: Each equipment type has count and revenue fields
Backend: Equipment type total count matches closed_deals
Backend: /admin/comparison returns accessories in totals
Backend: All 6 SPIFF fields present: apco_x, samsung, mitsubishi, surge_protector, duct_cleaning, self_gen_mits
Backend: Each accessory has count and value fields
Backend: Accessory counts are units (leads with SPIFF > 0), not dollar amounts
Backend: Pay period filter affects equipment_types data correctly
Backend: Pay period filter affects accessories data correctly
Backend: Company KPIs (total_leads, closed_deals, total_revenue etc.) still present - no regression
Backend: Salesperson ranking data still present - no regression
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Company Totals (Revenue, Commission, Closed, Total Leads, Lost)
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Key Rates (R%, Access %, Avg Ticket, GP %, PM Jobs, PM %)
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Lead Status pie chart with Closed/Pending/Lost percentages
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Equipment Revenue bar chart with revenue per equipment type
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Equipment Breakdown table with Qty, Revenue, and percentage
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Accessories Sold section with all 6 accessory types
Frontend: Accessories Sold shows count and SPIFF value for each accessory type
Frontend: Total accessories badge shows correct count
Frontend: All equipment items have data-testid attributes (equip-0, equip-1, etc.)
Frontend: All accessory items have data-testid attributes (accessory-apco_x, accessory-samsung, etc.)
Frontend: Salespeople tab shows full ranking table with all metrics - no regression
Frontend: All Data tab shows data table with all columns - no regression
Frontend: Pay period filter updates equipment and accessory data correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Good: /admin/comparison endpoint correctly computes equipment_types from unit_type field of SALE leads
Good: Accessories are correctly counting units (SPIFF > 0) not summing dollar values
Good: Pay period filter correctly filters both equipment_types and accessories data
Good: Frontend AdminOverview.js correctly renders Equipment Revenue bar chart using Recharts
Good: Frontend AdminOverview.js shows Equipment Breakdown table with Qty, Revenue, and percentage
Good: Frontend shows all 6 accessory types with individual counts and SPIFF values
Good: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Equipment and Accessories features tested successfully. Backend /admin/comparison now returns equipment_types (from unit_type field) and accessories (from SPIFF fields) in totals. Frontend AdminOverview.js displays Equipment Revenue bar chart, Equipment Breakdown table (Qty, Revenue, %), and Accessories Sold section with all 6 accessory types. Pay period filter correctly affects all equipment and accessory data. All regression tests pass for Company Totals, Key Rates, Lead Status pie, Salespeople tab ranking table, and All Data tab.
